name: diamond-deps
description: Tests non-linear topo sort: A and B have no deps, C depends on both A and B. No $prev (multi-dep stage can't use it).

stages.name: research-market
stages.prompt: Write 2 bullet points about the current state of the AI coffee machine market. Write to the output file. Be concise.

stages.name: research-tech
stages.prompt: Write 2 bullet points about the key technologies needed for an AI coffee machine (sensors, ML models). Write to the output file. Be concise.

stages.name: synthesize
stages.prompt: You are synthesizing two research reports. There should be two output files from earlier stages in this pipeline run directory — one about market research and one about technology research. Find and read both files, then write a 3-sentence executive summary combining both perspectives. Write the summary to your output file.
